name: Adverse event enters exception mode and ends with safety guidance
description: Reports a possible reaction to a medication. The engine should enter exception mode, ask clarifying questions, end with a safety notice, and record an adverse_event observation on the Disease Card.

script.text: I got a rash after using my inhaler yesterday
It started about 30 minutes after I used it
Yes it itched and I felt a bit wheezy
I took my reliever and it helped a bit

expectations.description: Anomaly triggers exception mode clarifying question
Exception mode ends with safety guidance mentioning GP or pharmacist
A Disease Card is generated after the exception check-in
